description:
The iptables-persistent package can be removed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf remove iptables-persistent
rationale:
Running both <tt>ufw</tt> and the services included in the
<tt>iptables-persistent</tt> package may lead to conflict.
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the iptables-persistent package is installed: 
$ rpm -q iptables-persistent
fixtext:
The iptables-persistent package can be removed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf remove iptables-persistent
title: Remove iptables-persistent Package
